programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, Misae, and Hiroshi are afflicted with a fever due to the onset of difficult weather. As a result, the family takes the neccessary measures.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan invite Nanako on Sunday to have lunch. As a result, an excited Shin-chan wakes up early to meet Nanako.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae teaches Hiroshi and Shin-chan how to create a happy environment in the household. However, she is unable to keep up with her own guidance.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae goes out for shopping after leaving the baby in the care of Hiroshi and Shin-chan. Later, the baby gets hungry and Misae feeds it upon her return.

programme.title: Shin Chan Movie - Villian Aur Dulhan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is approached by his time-traveling future bride-to-be Tamiko, who asks him to help save his adult self from the ruler of Neo Tokyo.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan Movie: Robot Dad
programme.desc: Shin-chan gets excited to see his father Hiroshi turn into a robot. However, he must fight other robots in order to help his father reclaim his original body.

programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Daittya Rani takes on the fairies at the ceremony and tells them to respect her power. Can Baalveer help the fairies?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Montu tries to perform good deeds but he fails as nobody trusts him. Meanwhile, Daittya Rani progresses toward her plans with the help of magic.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baalveer and the kids enjoy the celebrations in Pari Lok with dance and music. Meanwhile, Mahesh's father tricks the entire family into believing that God is in the house.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As the children have a gala time in Pari Lok. Daittya Rani decides to exchange the friendly creatures with her Mayabi Bhromor. Meanwhile, Mahesh's father continues his quest to find some sweets.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal complains to Inspector Pandey about Manhar invading his shop; Rajkumar Singhania visits Jethalal's store but gets forced to leave by Manhar Manmoji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal brings Manhar Manmoji to Gokuldham Society by force. During the ordeal, Manmoji gets forced to travel with Bhide on his scooter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya meets Manhar Manmoji and tells her father-in-law that he has gone mad; a team of news reporters barge into Gokuldham to talk to Manmoji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the colony members enjoy their time at the bungalow, Chakori waits patiently for night to fall. Will she end up spooking everyone once darkness sets in?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is terrified after spotting Chakori on the terrace. Later, while everyone relaxes by the pool, he sees a shadow again. Will anyone believe what he saw?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Obsessed with Chakori, Popatlal continues to ignore warnings and keeps going back to the well. But, his stubbornness could have serious consequences.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: On their final day at the bungalow, everyone enjoys games and cautions Popatlal to avoid the well. But, Popatlal is not very keen on heeding their warnings.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the men prepare to party on their final night at the bungalow, Popatlal longs to see Chakori one last time. But, her presence threatens to turn the evening's revelry into terror.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the men retire from their party, Bhide encounters Chakori. So, now Bhide is alone and scared as he comes face to face with the enigmatic spirit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Bhide is haunted throughout the night by Chakori, he goes to share his experience with the others. But, nobody believes him and says that he was just drunk from the party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal eagerly plans to propose to Chakori on the final day of the trip. However, a twist in his path may prevent him from meeting her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal, deeply smitten with Chakori, longs to confess his affection for her. But, he worries about how his friends would react when they finally meet her and learn of their love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide refers to Chakori as a \"Bhootni,\" Popatlal, who is deeply in love with her, is hurt, leading Chakori to depart in anger. But now, Bhide has to convince everybody of his spooky encounter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal, desperate for forgiveness, tries to make amends with Chakori. At the same time, Bhide attempts to tell the others about his spooky night with Chakori.

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: After analysing the dead bodies of three men, Dr Salunkhe affirms that the killer murders like a wild animal. Later, Team CID uses their wit and the doctor's suggestion to nab the culprit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally caves in and decides to wear the ring. Soon, he begins to experience a radical change in fortunes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is shocked by the incredible twist of events that take place after he wears the ring. Later, Sundar drops by at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in a spot of bother as he is accused of stealing something. Later, the police interrogate him about the matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal calls a society meeting and informs everyone that their lives are going to change as he has ordered the magical rings for everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anna accuses Jethalal of trying to sell the magical rings to make a profit. Soon, Jethalal confronts Anna about the accusation and the two begin to fight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethala distributes the magical rings to the members of the society. However, Popatlal refuses to take the ring, saying his problems are special and not common.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries his best to convince the others that the ring does not contain magical powers. However, his efforts are in vain as everyone refuses to believe him.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Putana is on her way to wreak havoc on the community and slay Lord Krishna, as ordered by Kans. Later, Yashoda outfits Lord Krishna in one of the finest robes, making him divine.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Super Dancers almost finish their journey as the competition wraps up. Later, one of them emerges victorious and claims the coveted title.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Presenting the latest products live on television that can be ordered directly. The product range extends from vacuum cleaners and bath towels to sports equipment.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.desc: Tapu spends his holiday playing cricket in Gokuldham, which leads to property damage that causes everyone frustration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu spends his holiday playing cricket in Gokuldham, which leads to property damage that causes everyone frustration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to tone down Tapu's naughtiness, Jethalal decides to take him to his store. However, Tapu firmly refuses to accompany Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to tone down Tapu's naughtiness, Jethalal decides to take him to his store. However, Tapu firmly refuses to accompany Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Dr Dev rushes to help a traffic police officer suffering from a brain stroke, but back at the hospital an unexpected threat begins to close in on him. What danger is waiting for Dr Dev?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to tone down Tapu's naughtiness, Jethalal decides to take him to his store. However, Tapu firmly refuses to accompany Jethalal.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Meet the Divekar family, where Anvita Divekar carries the responsibilities of the entire household.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma makes a promise to a lady that she will help her reclaim her job. Later, Karishma is shocked to see that Fatima has been hired for the post.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: On being invited to her new boss's house, Fatima agrees to visit him. Fatima then learns that she will have to visit Karishma's police station to verify her identity card.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.desc: On being invited to her new boss's house, Fatima agrees to visit him. Fatima then learns that she will have to visit Karishma's police station to verify her identity card.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal visits Dr Hathi and asks him to administer an injection to Jethalal. However, he accidentally ends up injecting Bhide with the medicine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide walks around in pain and tells his friends about Dr Hathi's accidental injection; Popatlal receives an unexpected call from Kaveri.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal has no option, he disguises himself as the pani puri vendor and starts selling it himself. He later feels embarrassed when people start recognising him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is making and selling the pani puris himself, Iyer and Babita pass by and see him. He gets embarrassed and tries to hide.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: The Kapil Sharma Show - Masti Lagataar
programme.desc: Host Kapil Sharma invites celebrity guests, who discuss their latest projects, while keeping the audience laughing with his humourous take on several topics.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: A compilation of the best moments from the Kapil Sharma Show features the renowned comedian Kapil Sharma entertaining the audience with hilarious skits and interactions.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Kulkarni vows to tarnish Sai's image as he holds him accountable for the incident. Meanwhile, Sai teaches a valuable lesson to everyone present at his house.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Salim garners attention from the villagers when he gets an extravagant gift. In the meantime, Kulkarni wishes to usurp the gift from Salim at all costs.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Salim garners enormous attraction from the villagers because of his gramophone. On the other hand, Kulkarni fumes with anger when he learns about Salim's popularity.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: Fascinated by the gramophone, the villagers flock to the music while ignoring Sai and his sermons. Later, Kulkarni is incensed when his light show does not draw any attention.
